job_title: Software Engineering MTS (iOS SwiftUI + Frontend Engineer)
job_description:
• Partner closely with product marketers, demo architects, and designers to understand product strategy and distill key functionality and benefits into engaging demo experiencesBuild polished native iOS demo experiences using Swift, SwiftUI, and modern iOS development patternsDevelop frontend web experiences using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Lightning Web ComponentsTranslate high-fidelity designs into functional, visually accurate prototypes across mobile and webBuild UI-heavy experiences such as guided product flows, notifications, animations, state transitions, and interactive demo screensIdeate and build prototypes for important Salesforce product launches, events, and customer-facing experiencesContribute to reusable components, maintainable architecture, testing, documentation, and release readinessWork across multiple projects concurrently with designers, developers, marketers, and product stakeholders from concept to completionKeep current with technology trends and understand how emerging technologies can be incorporated into our keynotes, events, and demo experiences Experience with React (or similar) or Lightning Web ComponentsExperience developing on the Salesforce platform, including Lightning Web Components, Aura, Apex, or Salesforce administrationAbility to turn high-fidelity designs into functional prototypes using HTML/HTML5, CSS/CSS3, JavaScript, Swift, and SwiftUIExperience building polished demo, prototype, or simulation-style applicationsExperience translating product flows across native mobile and web experiencesExperience improving existing codebases through reusable components, architecture cleanup, testing, documentation, and better error handlingFamiliarity with backend development concepts such as REST APIs, microservices, and server-side integrationsExperience developing user interfaces in non-traditional formats such as large-format screens, car dashboards, AR/VR, or event-based experiencesExperience with Salesforce unit testing, packaging, or deployment processesAbility to collaborate and communicate across multiple complex projects with designers, developers, marketers, and product teams from concept to completion 4+ years of professional software engineering experienceStrong proficiency with iOS development using Swift and SwiftUIExperience building native iOS applications or prototypes with modern app architecture patterns such as MVVM, state management, and navigationExperience with async/networking in Swift, including URLSession, JSON decoding, and error handlingStrong frontend development skills with HTML, CSS, and JavaScriptStrong UI implementation skills, including layout, animations, responsive behavior, and attention to visual detailFamiliarity with Git and modern software development workflowsDriven, self-motivated, and flexible team player with the ability to collaborate across functionsCreative thinker who can turn product ideas and design direction into compelling technical prototypesA proven track record in the design, development, and delivery of creative software experiences Life at Salesforce Our Locations Our Locations North America Europe,
